metadata.description: Eleven context-engineering plugins for GitHub Copilot, APM, and Claude Code: retrieval modalities, hybrid local RAG, durable memory, orchestration, steering, verification, runtime evidence, handoff, and portable plugin authoring.

plugins.name: retrieval-core
plugins.description: The spine: a retrieval-strategist agent and retrieval-strategy skill that pick and compose search modalities.

plugins.name: code-search
plugins.description: Fast CLI search across modalities: lexical, structural, code-intelligence, structured-data, history, rewrite, metrics, and docs.

plugins.name: local-rag
plugins.description: Fully-local semantic RAG: chunk, embed via ollama, index with turbovec; a bin/rag CLI with hybrid retrieval.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Skill-only RAG bridge: turn an Obsidian vault's graph and tags into a candidate set fed to local-rag.

plugins.name: plan-execute
plugins.description: Plan-big / execute-small orchestration: a strong model plans and delegates token-heavy work to cheaper subagents.

plugins.name: context-steering
plugins.description: Choose where guidance lives — always-on memory, path-scoped rules, on-demand skills, subagents, MCP servers, or deterministic hooks — to steer agents while keeping the always-on context budget small.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Read-only claim verification and prospective change-impact analysis with per-claim verdicts, blast-radius mapping, and file:line evidence.

plugins.name: runtime-evidence
plugins.description: Controlled runtime evidence for claims static verification cannot settle, using exact IDs from a user-owned command allowlist and bounded artifacts.

plugins.name: context-handoff
plugins.description: Portable, bounded, verified task-state handoffs with manual write/resume commands, a read-only compiler, and deterministic validation.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Provenance-bound durable memory with reviewed records, recall-then-verify workflows, an optional MemPalace provider, and opt-in capture.

plugins.name: plugin-forge
plugins.description: Author portable GitHub Copilot, APM, and Claude Code plugins with scaffolding, manifest/frontmatter checks, and deterministic catalog and release-readiness gates.
